steps.title: Identify what the human action accomplished
steps.content: When mastodons died, cucurbits faced extinction. The word “however” signals a reversal: Indigenous peoples began raising cucurbits as crops. The blank must express what this cultivation achieved.

steps.title: Match the action to its precise meaning
steps.content:
Cultivating the plants guaranteed their survival; “ensuring” means to make certain something happens.
“Verifying” means confirming what's already known (wrong direction), while “multiplying” and “comforting” don't fit the context of preventing extinction.

That is the correct answer.
